chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3647 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2016 and it came up in Court lastly on 06.02.2025 and thereafter this petition is pending without any progress. It shows that the petitioner has no interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
